## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
